//: MCP gateway pointer injected by the aish_enterprise plugin. The plugin loader MERGES this server into the client's MCP set (same schema as the client's own .mcp.json — src/mcp.rs). This is the single managed proxy (Pillar D): it holds OAuth/secrets for downstream servers, curates the per-org allow-list, meters calls, and enforces policy — so the user installs nothing else locally. ${env:...} is substituted by the client; the credential VALUE never leaves ~/.aish/credentials.
